tweets.text:
Subscribe to the MiniMax Token Plan: https://t.co/ng3AyOvQE7

Give your OpenClaw our multimodal skill: https://t.co/1wbCJWmCeC

Pricing and M2.7 five-hour usage remain the same as the Coding Plan.

Introducing the MiniMax Token Plan: First All-Modality API Subscription

Flat-rate API access to MiniMax's leading text, speech, music, video, and image models.

Stop juggling multiple unpredictable bills for different modalities.

One key. One predictable bill. All modalities.

x.name: Deedy Das
x.bio: Partner @MenloVentures. Formerly founding team @glean, @google Search. @cornell CS. Investor @AnthropicAI, @GoodfireAI, @OpenRouter, @WisprFlow, @_inception_ai

tweets.text: Uses Whisper TTS for speech recognition, Qwen 14B as the LLM and Kokoro for voice.

Siri has been broken for 13 years so I built my own. Completely on-device. No internet needed.

Controls my Mac, sets reminders, fetches live data, answers questions. Built in a weekend. 

This is the future of software. https://t.co/0UUu8jIhoe
